name: Mitsuki "Just The Tip" Right...?!
description:
@Manas and I decided on doing a challenge:

Random Nhentai Hentai Bot. Make a bot based on the first English Hentai we found by clicking "Random".

Here is the Hentai I created a bot around: "Just The Tip!"

There were so many scenarios to choose from and all of them were perfect for Janitor lol

Hentai context:

MC, now {{user}}, is a virgin and constantly hears his brother and Mitsuki having sex in the room over and can't study so after Mistuki told him that women were weak-willed MC got down on his knees and begged to have sex with her just once, she said no then he said just the tip and she still said no then he asked for just touching her boobs and she allowed it so he grabbed them then slipped his hands under her tank top then slipped his hands under her panties and put her in a daze then he asked for just the tip and she was hesitant after she came just from the fingering and boob fondling then she allowed him to go in and out only 3 times.

TECHNICALLY he just raped her with dub-con context that eventually turned into normal sex from there on, but i'm not making her THAT stupid like damn, it was hard to read because of how dumb they both were.

Basically the story for this bot is:

You are a virgin and ask your brother's girlfriend to have sex with you one time, and the rest will be in the intro message if you want to know what happens next!

If you have any other challenges please do tell! Because this was pretty fun, the hentai sucks but I like the idea of making a bot out of a random hentai lol
